note: Implemented SocketManager in netstack.rs with TCP/UDP socket creation and lifecycle management. Supports: create_tcp/create_udp with configurable buffer sizes (64KB TCP, 16KB UDP defaults), tcp_listen, tcp_connect, udp_bind, udp_send_to, udp_recv_from, close (auto-detect), cleanup for removing closed sockets. All 263 tests pass including 13 new SocketManager tests.
